title: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings
wikitext:
[]: Lamp Festival with Anno drawings             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Aug 20, 2013 8:56 pm I remember that there was some Lamp Festival that Anno went to, and he used to draw things related to the Eva films. When was the last Lamp Festival? Didn't he draw anything this time?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 20, 2013 9:07 pm 15 days ago http://forum.evageeks.org/post/657831/4th-Film-Info-READ-OP-Speculation/#657831

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Aug 20, 2013 9:12 pm Thank you very much! I don't know why, but I always ignore the threads marked as sticky without noticing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 05, 2014 8:32 pm New year, new festival lamp. "EVANGELION:3.0+1.0 etc."??? http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3201.html Eva Fan says in the article he'll update later with more news (as he finds out more, I'd assume). But if Anno's saying NTE really is a self-contained loop, or (even worse) the September 6th updated Next Time Preview for Final will be past NTE clips, I'll....! Complain loudly. Trolololol

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Aug 05, 2014 8:42 pm Translation please? Sailor Star Dust wrote: But if Anno's saying NTE really is a self-contained loop

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Aug 05, 2014 8:56 pm What's this?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 05, 2014 8:59 pm 無任原点 translates to something like "no beginning" or "without origin". EDIT: Turns out it's 無在 ("no location" or "nonexistence"). So, 無在原点 = something like "Nonexistent origin".

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:10 pm Anno wrote: "EVANGELION:3.0+1.0 etc."

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:18 pm Guy Nacks wrote: This seems like Anno's signifying that 3.0 and 1.0 have some common element or theme that will be touched on in FINAL.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:19 pm 1.0 is there because YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE must be repeated after Shinji was alienated in Q.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:26 pm Does this mean the fourth Eva film will be titled: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 : You Something (Not) Something

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:32 pm Why Anno? Anno why? What are ya doing Anno? What does it mean Anno? Where are you taking me?! Were are you THROWING ME!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:32 pm rummaging through electornic dictionaries 原点 げんてん genten (n) origin (coordinates) / starting point so 無 is a negative, zero, nothing. 任 is a status indicator, in the context of being in a position, having obligations and/or duty so 無任原点 is probably a very fancy way (and we know Anno and co. looooove kanjispam) of being lost. Both physically and mentally in Shinji's case at the end of Q: He's wondering in the desert being dragged by Asuka after having lost all purpose in life. Combine that with the last post: +1.0 = YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE (and possibly YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE) and what you get is Shinji's exact position and expectations for the start of the final movie. No need to invoke the still completely baseless loop/sequel nonsense

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:34 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: What's this?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:42 pm Just a preventive headsup to not let this thread go into nothing but international title possibilities spam (thread here ). TMBounty_Hunter wrote: so 無任原点 is probably a very fancy way (and we know Anno and co. looooove kanjispam) of being lost. Both physically and mentally in Shinji's case at the end of Q: He's wandering in the desert being dragged by Asuka after having lost all purpose in life.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 05, 2014 9:45 pm CJD, instead of fighting about silliness when there's insufficient evidence we should make a pact. After slaving away for however long it takes at whatever jobs, when we both make it to Japan for the premier and see the finished film we shall drop out pants and ask a panel of judges to decide whose anus was more ravaged.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Aug 05, 2014 10:02 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: After slaving away for however long it takes at whatever jobs, when we both make it to Japan for the premier and see the finished film we shall drop out pants and ask a panel of judges to decide whose anus was more ravaged.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 05, 2014 10:10 pm What? I’m just so confused right now, I don’t even know what to think.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Aug 05, 2014 10:25 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: What?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 05, 2014 10:33 pm Just a headsup from an old EGF friend: Shiro wrote: Can you tell the people in that thread that it's not 無任, it's 無在 which means "no location" or "nonexistence"
